meaning: North American Air Defense Command,北美防空联合司令部
examples: Why information about Flights 77 and 93 did not reach NORAD in a timely fashion is less clear.
Norad co-ordinates with Santa's elf launch staff to confirm his launch time, but from that point on, Santa calls the shots. We just track him.
Updates to the site are made every five minutes and the so-called "NORAD Tracks Santa" program has German, Spanish, French, Italian, Japanese and English links.
The NORAD commander said the Air Force could have stopped the planes if notified immediately.
In past years, NORAD partnered with Google to help track Santa using Google Maps and Google Earth.
